name: docling
summary: SDK and CLI for parsing PDF, DOCX, HTML, and more, to a unified document representation for powering downstream workflows such as gen AI applications.
author_email: Christoph Auer <cau@zurich.ibm.com>, Michele Dolfi <dol@zurich.ibm.com>, Maxim Lysak <mly@zurich.ibm.com>, Nikos Livathinos <nli@zurich.ibm.com>, Ahmed Nassar <ahn@zurich.ibm.com>, Panos Vagenas <pva@zurich.ibm.com>, Peter Staar <taa@zurich.ibm.com>
